generate a big prompt for website that will work like youtube

Develop a website similar to YouTube that allows users to upload, share and discover videos. The website should have a user-friendly interface that includes easy navigation, search functionality, and relevant video recommendations. The video player should be seamlessly integrated and support high-definition, 4K, and virtual reality video formats. The website should also have a robust content management system that allows users to categorize their videos, manage their channels, and interact with their fans. Other essential features should include commenting, liking, and sharing videos, as well as the ability to create custom playlists and subscriptions. To ensure the website's success, it should allow for monetization through advertising, sponsorships, and other revenue models. Lastly, the website should prioritize user privacy, security, and ensure compliance with all relevant copyright laws and regulations.
generate a big prompt for a website that will work like cloud storage

Develop a website that provides cloud storage services, allowing users to securely store and access their files from anywhere with an internet connection. The website should have a user-friendly interface that enables easy navigation, file management, and sharing. It should support various file types, including documents, images, videos, and audio, with sufficient storage capacity for large files such as high-resolution media. The website should prioritize data security by employing top-notch encryption protocols, multi-factor authentication, and regular backups to prevent data loss. Additionally, the website should allow for collaboration by facilitating real-time file access and editing by multiple users. Other essential features that should be included are synchronizing, automatic backups, version control, file sharing, and editing capabilities. Lastly, the website should ensure compliance with all relevant data privacy laws and regulations, including GDPR and HIPAA. It should also offer secure payment options for paid plans and timely customer support.
generate a big detailed prompt for desktop app that will work like paint+notepad

Develop a desktop app that combines the functionality of Paint and Notepad, providing users with a versatile tool for creating and editing visual and written content. The app should have a user-friendly interface that is easy to navigate, with a variety of tools and features that cater to both amateur and professional users.

The drawing and painting functionalities should allow users to create and edit graphics, including shapes, text, and images, with a wide range of editing tools such as brushes, pencils, erasers, color picker, and more. Users should be able to select from a variety of drawing and painting tools and colors with the ability to save and access palettes for easy access later. 

The writing functionality should include a Notepad-like text editor that includes word processing features such as spell-check, syntax highlighting, and autocorrect. Users should be able to easily create, edit, and format text documents with reference to the drawing and painting sessions.

Other features that should be included on the app include: 

1. File management: The app should allow users to manage their files easily, including saving and exporting files in different formats like PDF, PNG, JPEG, and others.

2. Collaboration: The app should also offer collaboration functionality, allowing users to share work and edit with other users in real-time.

3. Integration capability: Integration with other software and services such as Dropbox, Google Calendar, and others should be available.

4. Customizable interface: Users should have the ability to customize their interface to suit their preferences.

5. Advanced editing: Possibility to perform advanced image editing like cropping, resizing and other operation.

Additionally, data security should be paramount, so the app should support encryption and security protocols, as well as provide automatic backups. Lastly, the app should offer consistent customer support through various channels, with a subscription model available for premium features.
generate a big detailed prompt for website and prompt for game on that website, game shoud be like snake

Website Prompt:
Develop a website that includes a classic game like Snake, along with other casual gaming options. The website should have a user-friendly interface that enables easy navigation, with a modern aesthetic that appeals to different age groups. The website should provide a platform for both experienced and novice players to enjoy simple and challenging games. 

The website should offer various gaming options with different levels of difficulty and complexity, including puzzle games, arcade games, and board games. Players should be able to choose their preferred game category and access a variety of games within that category easily. The website should continuously update its game catalog to keep players engaged with fresh and exciting gameplay experiences. 

Other features that should be included on the website include:

1. Multiplayer capability: Players should have the ability to invite others to play games with them, or join a tournament and compete against other players globally.

2. Leaderboard and achievements: A leaderboard should provide players with an opportunity to see how they measure up against others, with the inclusion of achievement badges to earn when they hit certain milestones.

3. User account: Players should be able to create user accounts, to save high scores, which they can access their saved scores any time they play again.

4. Support and feedback: The website should have a comprehensive support structure available, including a detailed FAQ, tutorials, and customer support channels. Players should also have the ability to provide feedback on the game, including any features or issues they would like to see in future updates.

Game Prompt:
Develop a snake game that is simple yet engaging, with features that cater to both beginner and experienced players. The game should have bright and colorful graphics that are easy on the eyes while providing a modern aesthetic. Players should control the snake using simple arrow keys, with the goal of eating as much food as possible without running into the walls or the snake's tail. 

The game should have different levels of difficulty, with variations in game speed, obstacles, and power-ups. Advanced features like multiple snakes that players must navigate simultaneously to optimize their scores can be made available on higher levels. 

Players should be able to save their scores, track their progress on the leaderboard, and compete against other players globally. Special achievements and bonuses should be available to players who complete certain milestones without any negative impact on their snake's life. Lastly, the game should work seamlessly on both desktop and mobile devices, with a responsive design that adapts to different screen sizes.
generate a big detailed prompt for a mobile app that will help users organize tasks and manage productivity

Develop a mobile app that helps users organize tasks, manage productivity and achieve their goals. The app should be available for iOS and Android, with a user-friendly interface that is easy to navigate. The app should allow users to create customizable to-do lists, set reminders, track progress and monitor their performance.

The app's features should include:

1. Task Management: Users should be able to create and organize their to-do lists by assigning priorities, deadlines, and categories. Each task should be customizable, with the option to include notes, attachments, and subtasks.

2. Time Tracking: The app should enable users to track the amount of time they spend on each task, offering an insight into their productivity level. Users should be able to categorize completed tasks by project, date, and tag.

3. Personal Dashboard: The app should provide users with a visual representation of their progress, displaying the number of tasks completed, and providing a summary of their daily and weekly activities.

4. Notifications and reminders: The app should offer reminders that alert users of upcoming tasks, deadlines, and meetings. It should also provide push notifications to remind users to take breaks, exercise, or perform other tasks related to their personal development.

5. Statistical Analysis: The app should provide users with a detailed analysis of their performance, including the number of tasks completed, the average time required to complete a task, and the percentage of tasks completed on time.

6. Collaborative Features: The app should offer collaboration features, allowing users to invite team members, assign tasks, and monitor the progress of projects.

7. Integration Capability: The app should have seamless integration with other services, such as calendar applications, email, and cloud storage services.

Data Security should be paramount, with the app using the latest encryption standards, and the ability to back up user data to prevent loss of essential information. The app should also be regularly updated to fix bugs, improve performance, and ensure compatibility with the latest mobile software.

Lastly, the app should offer a subscription model for advanced features such as advanced reporting, unlimited tasks, and team collaboration. It should also have a comprehensive support structure available to users, with tutorials, FAQs, and customer service channels readily available.

Develop an AI-based "text to image" program that creates unique and cute anime/girl illustrations from written descriptions. The program should generate images that accurately reflect the input text while adding a creative flair to the image's output. A user-friendly interface will make it easy for users to enter precise descriptions.

The program should enable users to customize the girl's appearance by providing various options and settings, including hair color, eye shape, accessories, clothing style, and facial expressions. With the capacity to create thousands of different looks, users should be able to get even more creative by entering descriptions that depart from conventional human features- making their creations stand out as unique.

To ensure an exceptional experience, the AI should be sophisticated enough to interpret complex input sentences and produce vivid, lively, and polished images that accurately reflect the input provided. The AI system should learn from user feedback and improve the program's output progressively.

The AI system should encompass cutting-edge machine learning technology and feature the capability to continually innovate as it learns from user feedback. The program should provide users with the option to save and modify the images created for use as avatars, illustrations, or other graphic purposes.

Data privacy concerns should be paramount, with the program utilizing encryption measures to guarantee the privacy of user information. The program should also feature customer support services to assist with any inquiries or concerns users may have. Lastly, the program should be regularly updated to improve performance and add new features as they become available.
generate a detailed prmpt for website with chess game

Develop a website that features a chess game, alongside other chess-related resources and features. The website should have a user-friendly interface that caters to both novice and experienced chess players. Users should be able to either play against the computer or challenge other players through online multiplayer capabilities.

The chess game should include features such as custom board design, the option to pick different difficulty levels, and historical match simulations to keep the game fresh and interesting. The game's Artificial Intelligence should utilize machine learning to analyze and adapt to player moves, allowing for a more personalized playing experience for its users.

The website should also feature additional resources such as chess puzzles/courses, learning materials, and forums where users can exchange advice and information with other players. Forums and chat rooms should provide an “Anonymous Chess” feature enabling users to play against others of similar skill levels or preferences.

Other features that should be included in the website are:

1. Tournaments - Both casual and professional tournaments should be available, whether individual or team-based, with rewards and prizes for successful players.

2. Rankings and rating systems- A leaderboard should provide users with an opportunity to see how they measure up against others, while incorporating an ELO rating system recognizable by international chess federations.

3. Other Chess Versions: The website should also host other versions of the game, such as 3D Chess, Speed Chess, Blitz Chess, and Bughouse Chess.

4. Integration Capability: Integration with other software and services such as Twitch and YouTube should be available.

5. Personalized Experience: Personalization features like data collection of moves and strategies that can help the AI determine player’s strengths and weaknesses.

Most importantly, the website should ensure compliance with all relevant standards protecting online gaming regulations, privacy, intellectual property, and fair play practices. The website should also offer secure payment options for paid plans and timely customer support services.
generate a detailed prompt for website that will allow users to delete all cookies from browser

Develop a website that offers users the opportunity to remove all cookies from their web browsers. The website should have a user-friendly interface that is simple, clear, and easy to navigate. The website should be compatible with all major web browsers, including Chrome, Safari, Firefox, and Internet Explorer/ Edge.

The website should include the following features:

1. Cookie scanning: The website should scan the user's browser for all cookies in use and identify the source of those cookies.

2. Cookie deletion: The website should provide users with the option to delete all cookies with one click. The process of clearing all cookies should be fast and efficient.

3. Customization: Users should be able to customize what type of cookies to delete, based on categories like advertising, analytics, social media, and others.

4. Security: The website should employ advanced security standards and end-to-end encryption methods to ensure safe data transfer.

5. Privacy: The website should be designed with user privacy as a top priority, giving users transparent control over their data.

6. Tutorials and support: The website should offer comprehensive tutorials on how to clear cookies from different browsers, with 24/7 support to assist users experiencing any issues in navigating the process.

7. Customization functionality: Users should have access to advanced options that allow them to specify which cookies to delete, create a whitelist of cookies they want to keep or block, and adjust the frequency of scheduled cookie clearing

The website should adhere to all relevant privacy laws and standards, such as GDPR in the EU, HIPAA in the United States, and any relevant regulations in other regions. The website should also regularly update its security protocols and software to ensure that users' data is always protected. Lastly, the website should provide a balance between a free basic service and a paid subscription model that offers advanced features, such as scheduling, custom whitelist, and ad-block functionality.
generate a detailed promt for website that will be sending search prompts to google and then provide answer to user in the table format

Develop a website that collects user search input and generates answers by sending search prompts to Google and presenting them in a table format. The website should have a user-friendly interface with a search bar, where users can input their queries or select from a list of frequently asked questions.

The website should integrate with Google's search engine and use advanced algorithms to analyze the results and provide accurate and relevant answers. The website should present users with concise and helpful information displayed in a table format, offering easy-to-read access to essential data that is easy to digest.

Other features that should be included are:

1. Offline functionality: Users should have access to previous search results and answers, even if their internet connection is unstable.

2. Advanced search functionality: The website should have a range of search features, including Boolean operators, advanced filters, and sorting options.

3. API access: The website should offer API access, allowing other services, such as chatbots or voice assistants, to integrate with the website's functionality.

4. Customization options: The website should allow users to customize and save their preferences, including search history, saved queries, and filters.

5. Security and privacy: The website should prioritize user data privacy and take measures to protect user data such as securing the website with a SSL certificate.

6. Regular updates: The website should update regularly to ensure that users have access to the latest features and security protocols.

The website should ensure compliance with all relevant regulations related to privacy, data protection, and user consent. The website should also offer customer support channels, with timely resolutions of any issues and inquiries that arise. Lastly, the website should have a subscription model available for users who require advanced features, such as ad-free browsing, customized branding, and access to premium data sources.
generate a detailed prompt for a simple racing game for pc

Develop a simple racing game for PC that provides an enjoyable and competitive gaming experience for players. The game should have a user-friendly interface that is easy to navigate, with intuitive controls that provide for an immersive gaming experience.

The racing game should feature the following:

1. Racing tracks: The game should include a variety of tracks with different surfaces, obstacles, and levels of difficulty, drawn in 2D or 3D. The racing tracks should appeal to both novice and expert gamers and can be created with randomization algorithms to provide endless  fresh adaptations of classic race tracks.

2. Cars and customization: The game should provide users with various car models to choose from, with different specifications such as acceleration, speed, and handling. Users should also have options to customize and personalize their car to suit their preferences.

3. Racing modes: The game should include multiple racing modes, such as time-trial, against AI, and multiplayer modes. As the player progresses, they should unlock more cars and tracks, those that were previously unavailable during earlier gameplay.

4. Rewards and achievements: The game should offer rewards for completing various races such as trophies or virtual currency that can be used to purchase upgrades or unlock new playing modes.

5. Integration: The game should have integration with social media platforms that allow players to share their achievements and connect with other gamers.

6. Soundtrack: The game should have a captivating soundtrack that adds to the select gaming ambiance.

7. Optimized performance: The game should be optimized to run smoothly on a wide variety of PC configurations, ensuring an enjoyable experience for all gamers.

The game should adhere to relevant gaming regulations and standard guidelines, with attention paid to programming continuity in self-playing animations, and the ability to include other gaming hardware such as steering wheels or joysticks. Lastly, the game should have a comprehensive customer support service in place, with dedicated channels for gamers to address any concerns or issues.
